zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Margretha Sands於1698年10月15日在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 迪包格格洛斯-姆斯塔特受洗時，她的父親William Sands34歲，母親Elizabeth Schaferin20歲。她於1720年與Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr在美國阿拉巴馬州結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1755年12月14日在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯可爾布盧達爾 堂史普享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Margretha Sands于1698年10月15日在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 迪包格格洛斯-姆斯塔特受洗时，她的父亲William Sands34岁，母亲Elizabeth Schaferin20岁。她于1720年与Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr在美国亚拉巴马州结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1755年12月14日在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯可爾布盧達爾 堂史普享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sands
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

variants.name: Sand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bertel, Ejnar, Lars, Levinus, Nels, Niels, Thor.

English, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a patch of sandy soil, from the vocabulary word sand (German Sand). As a Swedish name it was often purely ornamental, and as a Jewish artificial. It is also found in France (see 3 below).
English: habitational name from a place such as Send (Surrey) or Sound (Cheshire), named with Middle English sand, sond ‘sand’.

variants.name: Sandes
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of various places so named in Galicia (Spain). Compare   Sandez  .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1752: Berks, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Berks, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Margretha Sands was christened on 15 October 1698, in Groß-Umstadt, Dieburg, Grand Duchy of Hesse, her father, William Sands, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Schaferin, was 20. She married Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr in 1720, in Alabama, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 14 December 1755, in Colebrookdale Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Margretha Sands a été baptisée le 15 octobre 1698, à Groß-Umstadt, Kreis Dieburg, Großherzogtum Hessen, son père, William Sands, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Schaferin, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr en 1720, à Alabama, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1755, à Colebrookdale Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Margretha Sands am 15. Oktober 1698 in Groß-Umstadt, Kreis Dieburg, Großherzogtum Hessen getauft wurde, war ihr Vater William Sands 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Schaferin 20. Sie hat 1720 in Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Dezember 1755 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Colebrookdale Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Margretha Sands(이)가 1698년 10월 15일 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 디버그 그로ss-스타드트에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Sands(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Schaferin(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1720년 미국 앨라배마 주에서 Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1755년 12월 14일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 콜레브룩데일 타운시프에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Margretha Sands foi batizada em 15 de outubro de 1698, em Groß-Umstadt, Kreis Dieburg, Großherzogtum Hessen, seu pai, William Sands, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Schaferin, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr em 1720, em Alabama, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1755, em Colebrookdale Township, Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Margretha Sands была крещена 15 октября 1698 г. в местности гроss-умстадт, крис диебург, гроssхирзогтум хессен, её отцу по имени William Sands было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Schaferin, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr в 1720 г. в местности Алабама, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 14 декабря 1755 г. в местности колебрукдеил тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr en 1720, en Alabama, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas.
